nasb.text: And if it is with difficulty that the righteous is saved, what will become of the godless man and the sinner?

esv.text: And “If the righteous is scarcely saved, what will become of the ungodly and the sinner?”

cnv.text: “如果義人僅僅得救， 不敬虔和犯罪的人，又會變成怎樣呢？”

ccb.text: 如果义人得救尚且不易，不敬虔的人和罪人会有什么下场呢？

csbs.text: “如果连义人都好不容易得救， 那么，不敬神的人和罪人将会怎么样呢    ？”
